input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.9.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.9.6
            TITLE: the tsal must be visible:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.9.6: The TSAL must be visible:
EV.5.9.6 The TSAL must be visible: 
a. From every horizontal direction, except small angles which are blocked by the Main Hoop 
b. From a point 1.6 m vertically from ground level, inside a 3 m horizontal radius from the 
TSAL 
c. In direct sunlight

final_answer: rule EV.5.9.6: The TSAL must be visible: EV.5.9.6 The TSAL must be visible: a. From every horizontal direction, except small angles which are blocked by the Main Hoop b. From a point 1.6 m vertically from ground level, inside a 3 m horizontal radius from the TSAL c. In direct sunlight
